profile.name: UPPUTURI SUMAN
profile.title: Java Full Stack Developer
profile.summary: Java Full Stack Developer fresher with hands-on experience in Spring Boot, Hibernate, JPA, and RESTful API design, backed by a strong foundation in React and MySQL. Delivered 2+ end-to-end web applications featuring JWT authentication, role-based access control, and AI-powered features. Skilled in MVC architecture, Agile/Scrum delivery, and Git-based version control with a consistent focus on writing clean, scalable, and testable code.

projects.title: Smart Resume Builder with AI Suggestions
projects.description: Developed a full-stack SaaS resume builder with JWT authentication and role-based access control. Integrated AI for content suggestions and skill gap analysis. Implemented 10+ REST APIs using Spring Boot and configured MySQL with 7 relational tables. Built a responsive React frontend with live preview and PDF generation using iText.

projects.title: Contact Management System
projects.description: Architected a full-stack contact manager with JWT auth and role-based access for USER and ADMIN roles. Designed 16 REST APIs using Spring Boot and MySQL, improving data retrieval speed by 30% through indexing. Implemented favourites, photo upload, and many-to-many group organization using Hibernate/JPA. Built responsive React.js frontend with real-time search reducing lookup time by 40% for end users.

description: Architected 2+ web applications using Java, Spring Boot, MySQL, HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript following MVC architecture
Designed 10+ REST APIs using Spring Boot for backend processing, data integration and third-party integrations
Streamlined MySQL queries improving application performance by 30% through indexing and query refactoring
Collaborated in Agile/Scrum environment to deliver scalable, production-ready modules on schedule
Delivered responsive web applications using React, Node.js, and MySQL with reusable components and REST APIs
Enhanced MySQL queries and connection pooling to improve application performance
Resolved 10+ real-time issues to ensure stable performance and seamless user experience

education.institution: MVR College of Engineering and Technology
